items.title: 2 Profitable Stocks Worth Investigating and 1 That Underwhelm
items.description: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies - as Jeff Bezos said, "Your margin is my opportunity".

items.title: McDonald's (MCD) Valuation Check As Nostalgia And Value Marketing Campaigns Seek To Reinforce Customer Engagement
items.description: McDonald's (MCD) is leaning on nostalgia and sharper value messaging by reviving its fan requested Changeables Happy Meal toys while rolling out limited time menu items and price focused deals to keep cost conscious diners engaged. See our latest analysis for McDonald's. Those nostalgia and value moves come as McDonald’s shares trade at US$312.95, with a 3.2% year to date share price return and a 9.3% one year total shareholder return. This points to steady rather than surging momentum as new...

items.title: Domino's follows McDonald's menu plan, adds bigger deals
items.description: Fast-food chains have been fighting a value perception issue and have embraced deals in order to win over cost-conscious customers. Customers have become wary of prices because prices have been going up. Prices for food away from home have climbed 27.2% since June 2019, according to data from the ...

items.title: McDonald's (MCD) Rises Higher Than Market: Key Facts
items.description: McDonald's (MCD) closed the most recent trading day at $312.95, moving +1.2% from the previous trading session.

items.title: McDonald’s revives most-requested Happy Meal toys after 39 years
items.description: McDonald's has produced some of the most memorable Happy Meal toys in fast-food history, so iconic that many adults today still remember them fondly or even still have them in tucked away in their childhood bedrooms. Longtime fans may recall the Tamagotchi releases, the collectible Beanie Babies, ...

items.title: How Franchise Economics Can Fuel YUM's Next Growth Cycle
items.description: Yum! Brands' next growth cycle hinges on boosting franchise economics, using scale and technology to drive faster paybacks, expansion and durable margins.
